name: desktop
description: Desktop harness for Pi coding agents
author: OpenHarness

scripts.dist: pnpm run stage:node && pnpm run stage:pi && pnpm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml
scripts.dist:publish: pnpm run stage:node && pnpm run stage:pi && pnpm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --publish always
scripts.dist:dir: pnpm run stage:node && pnpm run stage:pi && pnpm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.yml --dir
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test src/main/workflow-pi.test.ts src/main/workflow-review-lines.test.ts src/main/thread-tools.test.ts src/main/office-tools.test.ts src/main/workbook-files.test.ts src/shared/thread-tools.test.ts src/shared/workflow-slash-tools.test.ts src/main/git-remote.test.ts src/renderer/src/lib/conversation-runtime.test.ts
